questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Set Operations?
options: Inefficient scaling of UNION vs UNION ALL memory overheads (duplicate filtering costs).
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of UNION vs UNION ALL memory overheads (duplicate filtering costs).
questions.explanation: The topic covers how UNION vs UNION ALL memory overheads (duplicate filtering costs) scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
